system_overview.name: IRER Validation Workbench & Remedial Manifold
system_overview.mission: Agnostic cyber-physical interrogation of spacetime-density simulations and autonomous code profiling.
system_overview.design_philosophy: ISA-101 Industrial HMI, Read-Only Observer, Cyber-Physical Telemetry
system_overview.primary_directive: Monitor the IRER-V14 JAX Physics Engine for topological drift and numerical instability without mutating the runtime environment.
discrepancies: V1 Freeze Pending: 95% complete, several architectural blockers remain (see architecture_layers).
closure_plan: Resolve all flagged issues in architecture_layers and implementation_issues before freeze.
system_overview.final_state: System is architecturally sound, agnostic, and ready for V1 freeze.

discrepancies: UnifiedLensExplorer lacks headless bulk selection and has semantic bleed-through
closure_plan: Move ChaosMode to _experimental/chaos and strip imports from GodViewLayout.
Create ForensicsDock wrapper for timeline and axiom inspector.
Refactor MonitorContainer to await baseline before SSE.
Implement Blob-based patch export utility in RemedialManifold.
Integrate @viselect/vanilla for bulk selection and audit semantic labels in UnifiedLensExplorer.
architecture_layers.final_state: All blockers resolved, UI is agnostic, performant, and architecturally sound.

architecture_layers.role: SSE telemetry proxy, API gateway, router for AI services
discrepancies: Patch export endpoint not fully wired
Contract versioning and SSRF/path traversal prevention need audit
closure_plan: Audit and enforce contract versioning and SSRF/path traversal prevention.
architecture_layers.final_state: Middleware is robust, secure, and fully integrated with frontend and scanner.

architecture_layers.role: AST parsing, drift detection, governance enforcement
discrepancies: Audit for accidental writes/temp files pending
Integration hooks and error handling need expansion
closure_plan: Audit scanner for accidental writes/temp files.
Expand integration hooks and error handling.
architecture_layers.final_state: Scanner is immutable, robust, and fully compliant with governance.

architecture_layers.role: Semantic vector search, bug/remedy matching, triage routing
discrepancies: Variable flow tracking (deep scan) and trend plot visualization are stubbed
closure_plan: Implement NaN propagation analysis and trend plot visualization.
architecture_layers.final_state: Knowledge engine is fully featured and integrated.
Physics engine remains sovereign and isolated.

architecture_layers.role: Isolate Test Bench, mount target as read-only
closure_plan: Verify TARGET_PATH binds to /mnt/target in bench-middleware container.

scan_results.final_state: Unified profile generated and consumed by UI.

remedy.final_state: Remedy contract is versioned and in sync.

telemetry_stream.payload: { h_norm: float, rho_max: float, step_count: int, instability_flag: 'URGENT' | null }
telemetry_stream.final_state: Telemetry stream is robust and contract-compliant.

kel_query.response: { fix_code: string, similarity: float, is_golden: boolean }
kel_query.final_state: Kel query contract is versioned and in sync.

rules_of_engagement: NEVER hardcode physics terminology in the UI. Read from backend payloads.
NEVER modify the Target System's code directly. Offer .patch files for human review.
ALWAYS maintain the ISA-101 gray-scale low-latency aesthetic in the UI.
DO NOT mix experimental 3D/Canvas rendering into the production DOM tree.
UI must remain strictly decoupled from IRER-V14 physics logic.
System is an Observer. Fixes proposed by AI must be exported as .patch files. System MUST NOT directly mutate the target irer-v14 source code.
Address flagged issues before implementing new features.

workflow_recommendations.description: Scan codebase for stubs, placeholders, and TODOs. Tag and prioritize for closure.
Identify and document unclear specs. Schedule design reviews for affected components.
Select critical components and drive them to completion before freeze.
Audit error boundaries, contract versioning, and test coverage.
Mark tasks that must be completed for V1 freeze.
